# Star Aesthetic Centre
> Medical aesthetics clinic in Durban North, KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa, led by Dr. Rajeev Bangalee (MB, BS — University of the Witwatersrand, 2001). All treatments are performed personally by Dr. Bangalee, a qualified General Practitioner specialising in Aesthetic Medicine with 15+ years of clinical experience.

## About the Practice

Star Aesthetic Centre is a doctor-led medical aesthetic clinic located at 22 Ennisdale Drive, Durban North. We provide advanced non-surgical aesthetic treatments and retail pharmaceutical-grade skincare. Dr. Bangalee is a member of the South African Medical Association (SAMA) and the Aesthetic and Cosmetic Association of South Africa (ACASA).

Contact: +27 31 573 1325 | info@staraesthetic.co.za
Website: https://staraesthetic.co.za

## Treatments

- [Botox (Anti-Wrinkle)](https://staraesthetic.co.za/treatments/face/anti-wrinkle-treatment) — Botulinum toxin for frown lines, forehead, and crow's feet. Excessive sweating (hyperhidrosis) treatment also available.
- [Lip Filler](https://staraesthetic.co.za/treatments/face/lip-filler) — Hyaluronic acid lip augmentation for volume, definition, and symmetry.
- [Jaw & Chin Contouring](https://staraesthetic.co.za/treatments/face/jaw-amp-chin-contouring) — Dermal filler jaw sculpting and chin projection without surgery.
- [Dermapen Microneedling](https://staraesthetic.co.za/treatments/face/dermapen-microneedling) — Collagen induction therapy for skin texture, scars, and anti-ageing.
- [Skin Peel (Chemical Peel)](https://staraesthetic.co.za/treatments/skin/skin-peel) — Medical-grade chemical peels for pigmentation, acne, and skin renewal.
- [Pigmentation Treatment](https://staraesthetic.co.za/treatments/skin/pigmentation-treatment) — Melasma, sun damage, and uneven skin tone correction.
- [Acne Treatment](https://staraesthetic.co.za/treatments/skin/acne) — Medical acne management combining peels, microneedling, and skincare.
- [Excessive Sweating (Hyperhidrosis)](https://staraesthetic.co.za/treatments/skin/excessive-sweating) — Botox injections for axillary hyperhidrosis.
- [Body Contouring](https://staraesthetic.co.za/treatments/body-wellness/body-contouring) — Non-surgical fat reduction and body shaping.
- [Medi-Lean (Medical Weight Loss)](https://staraesthetic.co.za/treatments/body-wellness/medi-lean) — Doctor-supervised medical weight loss programme.
- [Varicose Veins](https://staraesthetic.co.za/treatments/body-wellness/varicose-veins) — Sclerotherapy for spider veins and varicose veins.
- [Vitamin Drips (IV Therapy)](https://staraesthetic.co.za/treatments/body-wellness/vitamin-drips) — Intravenous vitamin infusions for energy, immunity, and skin health.

## Skincare Products (Online Shop)

- [Full product range](https://staraesthetic.co.za/shop)
- [Dermaceutic](https://staraesthetic.co.za/shop/brands/dermaceutic) — Pharmaceutical-grade skincare from France, personally selected by Dr. Bangalee.
- [Heliocare](https://staraesthetic.co.za/shop/brands/heliocare) — Advanced sun protection with Fernblock® technology.
- [ISDIN](https://staraesthetic.co.za/shop/brands/isdin) — Medical-grade photoprotection and dermatological care.
- [Mesoestetic](https://staraesthetic.co.za/shop/brands/mesoestetic) — Clinical-strength skin treatments and cosmeceuticals.
- [NeoStrata](https://staraesthetic.co.za/shop/brands/neostrata) — AHA/PHA-based anti-ageing and renewal.
- [SkinCeuticals](https://staraesthetic.co.za/shop/brands/skinceuticals) — Antioxidant and corrective serums backed by science.

- [About Dr. Rajeev Bangalee](https://staraesthetic.co.za/dr-rajeev-bangalee) — Credentials, qualifications, and clinical philosophy.

- [Free Skin Assessment](https://staraesthetic.co.za/skin-assessment) — Personalised skin health quiz with treatment recommendations.
- [Contact](https://staraesthetic.co.za/contact) — Address, phone, WhatsApp, and enquiry form.

## Location

22 Ennisdale Drive, Durban North, 4051, KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa.
Serving patients from Durban, Umhlanga, La Lucia, Ballito, Westville, and across KZN.
